title: Warehouse Associate
description: Full-time warehouse position. Loading, unloading, and sorting packages. Standing and walking for extended periods. Must be able to lift 50 lbs.

title: Cashier
description: Customer service and cash register operation. Friendly attitude required. Flexible scheduling available.

title: Customer Service Representative
description: Answer phones, assist visitors, file documents. State benefits included. Must pass background check.

title: Forklift Operator
description: Operate forklift in manufacturing plant. Prior forklift experience preferred. Safety training provided.

title: Food Service Worker
description: Prepare and serve meals in hospital cafeteria. Food handling certification helpful. Shifts available mornings and evenings.

title: Delivery Driver
description: Deliver packages on local routes. Must have valid driver's license and clean driving record. Vehicle provided.

title: Housekeeper
description: Clean guest rooms and common areas. Prior hotel experience a plus. Flexible schedule.

title: Security Guard
description: Patrol assigned areas, monitor security cameras, write incident reports. Night and weekend shifts available.

title: Medical Assistant
description: Assist physicians with patient care. Take vitals, prepare exam rooms. CMA certification preferred.

title: Maintenance Technician
description: Perform repairs and maintenance on residential units. Plumbing, electrical, and HVAC experience helpful.

title: CNA - Certified Nursing Assistant
description: Provide direct patient care in long-term care facility. Active CNA certification required. Day and evening shifts.

title: Retail Sales Associate
description: Stock shelves, assist customers, operate register. Flexible scheduling including weekends.

title: Line Cook
description: Prepare food items according to recipes. Fast-paced kitchen environment. Training provided.

title: Bus Driver
description: Operate fixed-route transit buses. CDL Class B required. Paid training available for qualified candidates.

title: Administrative Assistant
description: Provide administrative support. Answer phones, schedule appointments, manage correspondence. Proficiency in Microsoft Office required.
